mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO fault_detection (analysis_id, charger_id, pattern_id, transaction_id, detected_at, trigger_msg, follow_msg, severity, detail) VALUES
(#{d.analysisId}, #{d.chargerId}, #{d.patternId}, #{d.transactionId}, NOW(), #{d.triggerMsg}, #{d.followMsg}, #{d.severity}, #{d.detail})
mapper.select: SELECT fd.*, fp.name AS pattern_name FROM fault_detection fd LEFT JOIN fault_pattern fp ON fd.pattern_id = fp.id WHERE fd.analysis_id = #{analysisId} ORDER BY fd.detected_at DESC
SELECT fd.*, fp.name AS pattern_name FROM fault_detection fd LEFT JOIN fault_pattern fp ON fd.pattern_id = fp.id WHERE fd.charger_id = #{chargerId} ORDER BY fd.detected_at DESC
SELECT fd.*, fp.name AS pattern_name FROM fault_detection fd LEFT JOIN fault_pattern fp ON fd.pattern_id = fp.id ORDER BY fd.detected_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
